title: Convert Principal ID to 5-digit numeric display in user profile

requirements.text: Create a deterministic utility function that maps any Principal ID string to a consistent 5-digit number (00001–99999) using a hash-based algorithm. The same Principal ID must always produce the same numeric output.

quotes: convert the Principal ID into a shorter numeric representation — a maximum of 5 digits — to display in the user profile instead of the full Principal ID string

acceptanceCriteria: A utility function exists (e.g., in frontend/src/utils/) that accepts a Principal ID string and returns a zero-padded 5-digit string between '00001' and '99999'
The function is deterministic: the same input always produces the same output
The function handles any valid Principal ID string without errors

requirements.text: Update the UserProfileSection component (frontend/src/components/common/UserProfileSection.tsx) to display the 5-digit numeric representation of the Principal ID instead of the full Principal ID string. The copy-to-clipboard button should still copy the original full Principal ID.

quotes: convert the pricipal id to only numbers(maximum of 5)

acceptanceCriteria: The user profile section shows a 5-digit number (e.g., '42817') instead of the full Principal ID string
The displayed number is zero-padded to always be exactly 5 digits
The copy-to-clipboard button copies the original full Principal ID, not the numeric representation
The 5-digit display is consistent across sessions for the same Principal ID

constraints: Do not modify backend logic — the conversion must be purely a frontend utility
Do not edit files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or other immutable paths
The copy-to-clipboard functionality must retain the original full Principal ID value
nonGoals: Storing the numeric ID in the backend
Using the numeric ID as a unique identifier for any backend operations
Changing the authentication or identity flow
